# Pull Request Description

## Summary of Changes

Brief description of what this PR introduces or resolves.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / Performance improvement

## Testing & Verification

- [ ] Executed `npm run build` locally with 0 compilation errors.
- [ ] Executed `npx tsc --noEmit` with 0 type errors.
- [ ] Verified real OSINT data extraction and network graph rendering.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines.
- [ ] Self-review of code completed.
- [ ] Documentation updated to reflect changes.
